headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Texas Instruments (TXN) After A 50% One Year Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Texas Instruments at around US$214.98 is offering good value or asking too much price right now? This breakdown is designed to help you put a clear number on that question. With returns of 10.3% over the past week, 8.2% over the past month, 21.1% year to date and 50.2% over the last year, the share price is giving investors several reasons to reassess what they are willing to pay for the stock. Recent coverage has focused on Texas Instruments in the context of the broader...

headline: 5 Forgotten Old-School Tech Dividend Stocks That Could Crush the Market in 2026
summary: All the Magnificent 7 stocks that absolutely ruled the S&P 500 for three years are down in 2026, and with their decline, a tidy $ 2.1 trillion in market capitalization has been removed and is gone with the wind. headline: 3 Semiconductor Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: Semiconductors are the silicon backbone of the digital revolution. The amount of data we ingest is also increasing exponentially, leading to elevated demand for chips with more processing power. This secular trend bodes well for the industry, which has posted a six-month gain of 57.9% and beat the S&P 500 by 54.3 percentage points.

headline: Texas Instruments (TXN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of analog chip manufacturer Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) jumped 3% in the afternoon session after Stifel Nicolaus upgraded the stock to a "Buy" and raised its price target to $250.
